stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Reader tilize + writer untilize with compute passthrough (identity). Validates the full data path: RM input -> tilize -> tile copy -> untilize -> RM output.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check triage log at /tmp/tt-test-triage-dev0.log for more details. Verify all three kernels (reader/compute/writer) are making progress.

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Compute mean via reduce SUM with scaler=1/W, then subtract mean from input using broadcast COL. Output is zero-centered.

stages.name: full_normalize
stages.description: Full normalization without affine: subtract mean, square, compute variance, add eps, rsqrt, multiply to normalize.

stages.name: affine_transform
stages.description: Full layer_norm with optional gamma (weight) and beta (bias) affine parameters.
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
weight_t = ttnn.from_torch(weight, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
bias_t = ttnn.from_torch(bias, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
